recommendations.title: Mozart and the Whale
recommendations.overview: A love story between two savants with Asperger's syndrome, a kind of autism, whose conditions sabotage their budding relationship.

recommendations.title: Three Steps Above Heaven
recommendations.overview: Babi, a sheltered upper-class girl, and Hache, a reckless rebel obsessed with illegal motorcycle races, fall into a forbidden love that pulls them deeper into passion and risk.

recommendations.title: Touki Bouki
recommendations.overview: Mory, a cowherd, and Anta, a university student, try to make money in order to go to Paris and leave their boring past behind.

recommendations.title: The Little Rascals
recommendations.overview: When nine-year-old Alfalfa falls for Darla, his "He-Man-Woman-Hating" friends attempt to sabotage their relationship.

recommendations.title: El mesero
recommendations.overview: A waiter pretends to be an important businessman in order to reach the upper class through his entrepreneurial dreams.

recommendations.title: Metropolitan
recommendations.overview: A radical student is adopted by a group of young New Yorkers, serves as a catalyst to alter his and their lives. Gathering in a Manhattan apartment, the group of friends meet to discuss social mobility, Fourier's socialism and play bridge in their co

recommendations.title: Borgman
recommendations.overview: An enigmatic vagrant cons himself into the home life of an arrogant upper-class family, turning their lives into a psychological nightmare in the process.

recommendations.title: Asuran
recommendations.overview: A family from the underprivileged class is on the run after the teenaged son kills a rich man from the upper caste. Can the pacifist father be able to save his hot-blooded son?

recommendations.title: All That Heaven Allows
recommendations.overview: Two different social classes collide when Cary Scott, a wealthy upper-class widow, falls in love with her much younger and down-to-earth gardener, prompting disapproval and criticism from her children and country club friends.

recommendations.title: 18 Years Old and Rising
recommendations.overview: Primo is an ordinary middle-class youngster studying for his baccalaureate, who gets side-tracked when he falls in love with a rich girl. They soon learn they have to deal with her condescending friends who look down upon this upstart.
